articles.author: Lori Robertson, D'Angelo Gore
articles.title: Q&A on the SAVE America Act - FactCheck.org
articles.description: On March 17, the Senate began debate on the SAVE America Act, a Republican-backed voter identification and registration bill that passed the House last month. Here, we answer several questions about the legislation, many of them asked by our readers.

articles.author: Matthew Roberson
articles.title: Why Team USA Was So Hard to Root for in the World Baseball Classic - GQ
articles.description: Venezuela earned the WBC crown in a passionate display of baseball at its best—a far cry, writes Matthew Roberson, from how the Americans handled the otherwise festive tournament.
